name: renami-obsidian
description: An Obsidian plugin for content-aware automatic note name management.

scripts.build: rimraf ./dist && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && tsx ./scripts/build.ts production && pnpm run manifest
scripts.dev: rimraf ./dist && pnpm run manifest && touch ./dist/.hotreload && tsx ./scripts/build.ts
scripts.obsidian:link: pnpm run obsidian:unlink && mkdir -p "$(pwd)/examples/Demo Vault/.obsidian/plugins" && ln -s "$(pwd)/dist" "$(pwd)/examples/Demo Vault/.obsidian/plugins/renami"
scripts.release: pnpm run manifest && bumpp package.json manifest.json --commit 'Release: %s' --tag '%s'
scripts.renami:use-npm: pnpm remove renami && pnpm add -D renami

obsidian.author: Kitschpatrol
obsidian.description: Content-aware automatic note file name management.
obsidian.name: Renami
